examples.name: user_fact_basic
examples.scenario: User states a durable fact about themselves.

prior_turns.speaker: assistant
prior_turns.text: Tell me a bit about yourself.

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: I work as a data engineer at a fintech startup in Brooklyn. I've been there about two years.

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: I can't stand cilantro — tastes like soap to me. No actual allergies though.

examples.name: user_self_correction_supersession
examples.scenario: User corrects a prior fact. Emit the new claim; Pass-1 supersession links it to the older one.

prior_turns.speaker: user
prior_turns.text: My sister Anna just moved to Seattle last month.

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: Actually wait, I got mixed up — she moved to Portland, not Seattle. Portland, Oregon.

examples.active_claims_summary: c_001: user.user_relationship = 'sister Anna, recently moved to Seattle' (confidence 0.94)

examples.name: user_event_with_dates
examples.scenario: User states a future event. Preserve date specificity.

prior_turns.speaker: assistant
prior_turns.text: Anything on your calendar I should know about?

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: I'm flying to Boston next Wednesday for a three-day conference, back Friday night.

examples.name: user_goal_ongoing

prior_turns.speaker: assistant
prior_turns.text: What have you been up to outside of work?

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: Mostly Japanese — I've been doing about 30 minutes a day on Anki, roughly since February.

examples.name: user_constraint_scheduling
examples.scenario: User gives a hard scheduling limit.

prior_turns.speaker: assistant
prior_turns.text: I can suggest a lunch spot — what time works?

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: Has to be after 1 PM. I have back-to-back meetings until then every weekday.

examples.name: implicit_preference_habit
examples.scenario: User reveals a preference through a habitual action.

prior_turns.speaker: assistant
prior_turns.text: How do you typically start your mornings?

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: I always do 30 minutes of yoga before anything else. I tried running but it wasn't for me.

examples.name: implicit_preference_tool_choice
examples.scenario: User's tool choice implies a preference.

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: I use Neovim for everything — even writing documentation. Set it up with LSP and Copilot last year.

examples.name: implicit_preference_abandonment
examples.scenario: User reveals a negative preference by describing something they stopped doing.

prior_turns.speaker: assistant
prior_turns.text: Do you use any task management tools?

current_turn.speaker: user
current_turn.text: I gave up on Jira ages ago — too bloated. I just use a plain Markdown file now.
